title: Academic Achievement: Class Ranking
description: Class ranking determines how a student's academic performance compares to others in their graduating class, and this policy explains how Conroe ISD calculates and reports those rankings. It covers the rules for grade weighting, eligibility requirements, and how class rank may affect opportunities such as college admissions and automatic college acceptance programs. Students and families can use this policy to understand how academic choices, like course selection, may influence a student's standing in their class.
